word: G1174 - δεισιδαιμονέστερος - deisidaimonésteros - dice-ee-dahee-mon-es'-ter-os - Too superstitious

sections.paragraph:
δεισιδαιμονέστερος - deisidaimonesteros - dice-ee-dahee-mon-es'-ter-os

The compound of a derivative of the base of G1169 and G1142; more religious than others: - too superstitious.
